title: Junior Revenue Manager at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited!
